TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Md_Abdul_Hamid, title = Md_Abdul_Hamid, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Md_Abdul_Hamid} }

S.FORM: = Md. Abdul Hamid = Mntucing hngkawas 1944 idas 1 jiyax 1 ka Md. Abdul Hamid ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Bangladesh ta sayang o kiya ka Md. Abdul Hamid, pnaah hngkawas 2013 idas 4 jiyax 24 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = md. abdul ħamid = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka md. abdul ħamid ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan baŋladəsħ ta sajaŋ o kija ka md. abdul ħamid, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Md. Abdul Hamid = Mntucing hngkawas 1944 idas 1 jiyax 1 ka Md. Abdul Hamid ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Bangladesh ta sayang o kiya ka Md. Abdul Hamid, pnaah hngkawas 2013 idas 4 jiyax 24 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = md. abdul ħamid = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka md. abdul ħamid ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan baŋladəsħ ta sajaŋ o kija ka md. abdul ħamid, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
